title: All My Loving
content:
Early this week, someone told me to listen to a song played in one of ads on TV. Later, I found out that the song was originally performed by The Beatles. Found some MP3 on the Internet and I decided to test my ears.

!/gallery/misc/all_my_loving.jpg!


Above can be translated to human-readable text, like so:

bq..  **All My Loving**  / The Beatles

Close your eyes and I'll kiss you,
Tomorrow I'll miss you;
Remember I'll always be true.

And then while I'm away,
I'll write home every day;
And I'll send all my loving to you.

I'll pretend that I'm kissing
The lips I am missing
And hope that my dreams will come true.

And then while I'm away,
I'll write home every day;
And I'll send all my loving to you.

All my loving, I will send to you.
All my loving, darling, I'll be true.

Close your eyes and I'll kiss you,
Tomorrow I'll miss you;
Remember I'll always be true.

All my loving, I will send to you.
All my loving, darling, I'll be true.
All my loving .. All my loving ..
All my loving, I will send to you.

p.

 %(me)I know I can search for song lyrics everywhere on the Internet - but then, I'll lose all the fun. :)%

Oh, this happened on Rama I Bridge last night.

!/gallery/misc/fools.jpg!


... wondering how long they will live - or how long they  _want to live_ ?

Have a good day.

PS. In case you haven't noticed a new link on the right, I'd recommend you dropping by  "ekanake.net":http://www.ekanake.net/  every once in awhile. Many stories worth reading.
